talk_series.title: Space as Critical Infrastructure for Climate Intelligence
talk_series.summary: How satellite data is becoming essential infrastructure for climate monitoring, risk analysis, and sustainability decision-making.
key_points: Earth observation data pipelines for sustainability reporting
Climate intelligence systems built from satellite inputs
Connecting satellite data with business and ESG metrics

talk_series.title: Multi-Model AI Systems for Production
talk_series.summary: Practical architecture patterns for building multi-model AI systems in production environments.
key_points: Model routing strategies across Claude, Bedrock, and OpenAI
Cost-aware AI architecture and optimisation patterns

talk_series.title: From Satellites to Business Decisions
talk_series.summary: How Earth observation data is transformed into actionable insights across sectors.
key_points: Processing pipelines for Earth observation datasets
Use cases in agriculture, insurance, and logistics
